headline: Why Palo Alto Networks (PANW) Is Up 6.0% After Joining Anthropic’s Project Glasswing Cybersecurity Alliance
summary: In early April 2026, Anthropic announced Project Glasswing, a cybersecurity alliance that includes Palo Alto Networks, AWS, Apple, Google, Microsoft, NVIDIA, Cisco, CrowdStrike, JPMorganChase and others, giving them access to its unreleased Claude Mythos Preview AI model to hunt and fix software vulnerabilities at scale. The initiative highlights growing concern that advanced AI can discover and exploit critical flaws across major operating systems and browsers faster than most human...

headline: Palo Alto Networks Joins Project Glasswing As AI Security Role Grows
summary: Palo Alto Networks (NasdaqGS:PANW) has joined Project Glasswing, a new alliance to deploy advanced AI models for defensive cybersecurity. The alliance was formed after an unreleased Anthropic AI system showed unprecedented ability to identify software vulnerabilities. Project Glasswing brings together major technology, cloud, and security firms to coordinate AI assisted defense against AI enabled cyber threats. Palo Alto Networks focuses on network security, cloud security, and security...

headline: NWN Launches New Cybersecurity Offering with AI-Enabled Managed Security Operations, Expanded Strategic Partnerships, and New Platform Integrations
summary: BOSTON, April 08, 2026--NWN, the leading AI powered technology solutions provider, today announced the launch of NWN Cybersecurity, an AI enabled managed security operations suite that introduces new managed services, expands strategic security partnerships—including Palo Alto Networks, Cisco, and Arctic Wolf—and delivers new platform integrations through NWN’s patented Experience Management Platform (EMP) to help organizations modernize security operations and drive innovation in the AI era.
